description: Governed Drawing Instruction IR contract. Defines the valid instruction types, instruction fields, and boundary rules for construction-semantic IR. Runtime consumes this contract and does not define IR instruction types.
fail_closed_rule: If required component references, relationship references, or output intent are incomplete, IR emission must fail closed. The system must not emit partial drawing instructions or silently omit unresolved elements.
ir_boundary_rules: IR must not encode vendor-specific CAD commands
IR must not encode application-specific scripting
IR must not encode renderer-specific low-level instructions
IR must not encode absolute coordinate geometry
IR must not encode file format structures
renderer_separation_rule: The IR is renderer-agnostic. It defines what must be drawn. The renderer defines how it is geometrically emitted.
